channel.title: Integrated Control Technology LTD — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Integrated Control Technology LTD (ict).

image.title: Integrated Control Technology LTD — recent CVEs

item.title: CVE-2024-29941 · 8 HIGH — Credential Cloning
item.description: Insecure storage of the ICT MIFARE and DESFire encryption keys in the firmware binary allows malicious actors to create credentials for any site code and card number that is using the default ICT encryption.
